entries.title: Back to work after the holidays.
entries.body:
First day back. Inbox had 200+ emails. Spent the morning triaging and deleting the noise. Afternoon was more productive — merged two PRs that had been sitting since December.

Team morale seems good. Planning session on Friday.

entries.title: Started running again.
entries.body:
3 km this morning. Felt terrible but finished. Knees held up fine.

Goal: 5 km by end of month.

entries.title: Idea: offline-first sync without a server.
entries.body:
Been thinking about how to handle sync conflicts without centralised state. CRDT is probably overkill for a diary. Simpler approach: last-write-wins per entry with a manual merge UI shown on import conflict.

Write this up properly before it evaporates.

entries.title: Dentist, then dinner.
entries.body: Routine check — no cavities. Dinner at the new place downtown. Good pasta, slow service.

entries.title: Shipped v2.
entries.body:
Finally. Six months of work. The deployment was clean — no rollback needed. Stayed up watching logs for two hours anyway.

Team went out for drinks. Worth every late night.
